Spoiler: He's not a nerd in bed!!

YOOOOO THANK YOU FOR 1.4K BUBBS I CAN'T EVEN TELL HOW MUCH THIS MADE ME HAPPY!!!!!! I STILL REMEMBER US STARTING FROM 0 AND NOW WE'RE AT 1.4K AND STILL GOING GOOD. I'M SO PROUD OF US!!! 🥺💕🤌

I'm start to think my bots are getting boring, isn't it? Be for real with me. That's how I'm feeling them. Like I can't see the creativity anymore.

Do you guys think I should change my PFP?

My bf getting comfortable in sharing his pictures and things OH HOW MUCH I'M PROUD OF HIM!!!!!! I LOVE HIM!! BEST BOII EVER!!
